title: Math Academy Agent
tagline: Claude does the math homework, typing answers at a suspiciously human pace.

title: Math Academy Solver
tagline: The v2: now it can see the diagrams. Auto-solves whole tasks until it gets one wrong.

title: Khan Academy Video for Math Academy
tagline: Math Academy tells you what to learn, not how. This puts the right Khan video one click away.

title: Khan Booster
tagline: The Khan-video extension, round two: saved mappings, history, and a no-API-key fallback.

title: Kairos Tracker
tagline: Every student is a rocket. A gamified classroom tracker in one 12,000-line HTML file.

title: Kairos GP
tagline: The classroom tracker as a Grand Prix: students are race cars, good work moves them up the track.

title: learn-smth
tagline: Type "Kafka", get a sim game that teaches it — with a solvability proof so every level can be won.

title: skill-learner
tagline: Reads my Claude Code transcripts for corrections and writes them into memory. Fool me once.

title: Prompting Course
tagline: A five-module course on prompting Claude, from "what is an LLM" to agents. One HTML file.

title: How Tech Works
tagline: One page explaining how technology actually works. Writing it down is how you learn it.

title: hour-tracker
tagline: A time tracker styled as a rocket launch console, because a plain timer wasn't going to get used.

title: Habit Tracker
tagline: Habit reminders that text you via iMessage — but only if you haven't already done the thing.

title: Engram
tagline: A free Enneagram test with wings, tritype, and a tiebreaker built to get past your ego's answers.

title: rust-study
tagline: Learning Rust with rustlings, clippy, and a $0 AI tutor. The borrow checker is the curriculum.
